title: Perfectly Optimised
description: Quality of life and performance modpack, created by the SpaceSMP team!
body:
## Welcome to the Perfectly Optimised, a SpaceSMP Projects!
---
This modpack is designed to optimise the game, while providing a "Perfected" Vanilla experience.

Included inside is a small collection of mods to enchance the vanilla experience.

The owners of this project own a minecraft server called SpaceSMP, there is a custom title panorama of a build on the server, which updates each release!


Project formally known as the SpaceSMP Modpack.
Name is not a typo, we're just Australian ;)

If you'd like to support us indirectly, feel free to use our affiliate link for UltraServers. They're the host we use on the SpaceSMP server. 
https://ultraservers.com/aff.php?code=SpaceSMP
---

All Rights Reserved
